scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.test:dev: concurrently -k -s first -n server,client,cypress -c blue,green,cyan "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client" "npm run test:dev:bare" --hide server
scripts.test:prod: concurrently -k -s first -n server,cypress -c blue,cyan "npm run build && PORT=3000 npm run production" "npm run test:prod:bare"
scripts.test:prod:windows:bare: wait-on "http://localhost:3000" && CYPRESS_USER_AGENT_OS="Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64" cypress run --browser chromium
scripts.test:prod:windows: concurrently -k -s first -n server,cypress -c blue,cyan "npm run build && PORT=3000 npm run production" "npm run test:prod:windows:bare" --hide server
